name: Related products
description: Auto-populated 'Related products' widget on a product page — pulls from the current product's relations defined in the catalog; no settings needed. Restricted to the `product` template. Use when: composing a product detail page and wanting the standard 'Related products' section after `product-info`. Skip when: not on the `product` template, or wanting a manually curated list (use `products-carousel` with `skus` instead). `settings` is empty.
